sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9750" key="a)ntefi/sthmi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεφ-ίστημι</orth>, <sense id="n9750.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">appoint against</tr_> one, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στρατηγούς τισι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.173J.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
